name: proxmox-manager
description: Full Proxmox VE management — VMs, containers, snapshots, storage, and Kubernetes cluster provisioning

PROXMOX_HOST.description: Hostname or IP of your Proxmox VE server (e.g. 192.168.1.100 or pve.local)

PROXMOX_TOKEN_ID.description: Proxmox API token ID in the format user@realm!tokenname (e.g. root@pam!claude)

PROXMOX_TOKEN_SECRET.description: Proxmox API token secret — generated when you created the token in Datacenter → Permissions → API Tokens

PROXMOX_NODE.description: Name of the Proxmox node to manage (e.g. pve, node1) — visible in the Proxmox web UI sidebar

PROXMOX_VERIFY_SSL.description: Whether to verify SSL certificates. Set to false for self-signed certs (typical in homelabs)
